---
title: "test_uplink.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/crucible/test_uplink.py"
loc: 33
complexity: 3
logic_score: 5.60
style_score: 3.86
intel_score: 8.67
overall_score: 6.71
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating TestAntigravityUplink, test_payload_structure. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)

### Exports
- `TestAntigravityUplink`
- `test_payload_structure`
- `test_bridge_offline_fallback`
